title: Floating Island For Survival
description: Floating island world preset for SURVIVAL!
body:
# Floating Island For Survival
## A floating island pack for **Survival**!
+ -64 ~ 319 height
+ Bigger islands
+ Nether support

## Effects:
+ The overworld and the nether will be floating islands
+ ![Water Bucket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/283cfc0a0b0dab87fd167ff75c97bf6751f4c796.png)Water buckets are much more useful to go up and down.
+ ![Deepslate Diamond Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b26725e24f8b7fc98c24ad23fa3d7f870b512f49.png)Ores can be easily seen on the surface.
+ ![Lose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbf57578671ebac0913606bbb1059048846fb09d.png)You will lose everything in your inventory when falling into the void without _KeepInventory_ !
+ ![Mine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8f50f971086a4ca2e32d009ccf4e58a91b1b9bf.png)Be careful when you are mining because you may fall down anytime.
+ ![Gravity Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98e160691e56098ec3f7efdbc11f0762cd2daff2.png)Pay attention to the sand and gravel.
+ ![Difficulty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6758a184a4b1ce9e3b5d5a692748741b6d5414c.png)Just medium difficulty!

![View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c55d19ec325b1f06a5b4ad923403754a4b57dfa7.jpeg)

## Enabling:
1. Press `Create New World` and enable the datapack.
2. Swith `World Type` to `generator.floating.island` and create the world
